description.value:
A breed created by serpent people mixing dogs with venomous serpents and Tindalosian hound blood. Appears as unremarkable mongrel with thin build, shaggy greyish fur. Has retractable claws like cats and venomous fangs. Possesses supernatural tracking ability.

Category: Folklore Monster

Characteristics

STR
60		 CON
75		 SIZ
30		 DEX
75		 INT
35		 POW
65

HP: 10 | DB: 0 | Build: 0 | Move: 12

Attacks

AttackSkillDamage
Claw attack50%1D4
Venomous bite50%1D4+Special

Armor: None, but takes minimal damage from non-magical weapons; heals 1 HP/hour

Skills: Climb 80%, Jump 70%, Listen 75%, Spot Hidden 60%, Track (scent + aura bonus die 1/day) 90%

Sanity Loss: 0/1D3

Special Abilities

  • Retractable claws like cats, excellent climbers
  • Venomous fangs deliver 1D10 damage over 1D3 hours (CON check for half)
  • Supernatural tracking ability - can track using spiritual aura once per day
  • Minimal damage from non-magical weapons
  • Heals at 1 HP per hour
  • Difficult to train, requires early bonding
  • If bonded, extremely loyal and protective
